zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William Clere於1340年出生在英國諾福爾可奧斯比 聖 邁克爾時，他的父親Sir Robert Clere Baron44歲，母親Alice de Filby38歲。他於1351年與Dionisia Wichingham在英國英格蘭諾福爾可奧斯比 聖 邁克爾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1384年11月20日在英國英格蘭諾福爾可奧斯比 聖 邁克爾享年44歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir William Clere于1340年出生在英国諾福爾可奧斯比 聖 邁克爾时，他的父亲Sir Robert Clere Baron44岁，母亲Alice de Filby38岁。他于1351年与Dionisia Wichingham在英国英格兰諾福爾可奧斯比 聖 邁克爾结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1384年11月20日在英国英格兰諾福爾可奧斯比 聖 邁克爾享年44岁。

nameMeanings.name: Clere
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Clear
meanings: English (southeastern England, of Norman origin): from Clere, the French popular form of the personal name Clare 2, and possibly interchangeable with it or confused with it.

English (southeastern): probably a habitational name from clere, a component of several placenames in north Hampshire (Highclere, Burghclere, Kingsclere). This is probably from a Celtic stream name meaning ‘bright’ (cognate with Latin clarus ‘clear, bright’).
Americanized form (translation into English) of German   Klar   1.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William Clere was born in 1340, in Ormesby St Michael, Norfolk, England, his father, Sir Robert Clere Baron, was 44 and his mother, Alice de Filby, was 38. He married Dionisia Wichingham in 1351, in Ormesby St Michael, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 20 November 1384, in Ormesby St Michael, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 44.

Il a épousé Dionisia Wichingham en 1351, à Ormesby St Michael, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 20 novembre 1384, à Ormesby St Michael, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 44 ans.

Lui sposato Dionisia Wichingham nel 1351, nel Ormesby St Michael, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. ko.lifeSummary: Sir William Clere(이)가 1340년 영국 노르폴크 오메스비 스트 믹하얼에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Robert Clere Baron(은)는 44세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice de Filby(은)는 38세였다. 그는 1351년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 오메스비 스트 믹하얼에서 Dionisia Wichingham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1384년 11월 20일 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 오메스비 스트 믹하얼에서 44세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Clere nasceu em 1340, em Ormesby St Michael, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Robert Clere Baron, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Alice de Filby, tinha 38 anos. Ele casou-se com Dionisia Wichingham em 1351, em Ormesby St Michael, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 20 de novembro de 1384, em Ormesby St Michael, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 44 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William Clere родился в 1340 г. в местности ормесби ст мачаел, норфолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Robert Clere Baron было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Alice de Filby, 38. Он женился на женщине по имени Dionisia Wichingham в 1351 г. в местности ормесби ст мачаел, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер 20 ноября 1384 г. в местности ормесби ст мачаел, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 44 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir William Clere nació en 1340, en Ormesby St Michael, Norfolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Robert Clere Baron, tenía 44 años y su mamá, Alice de Filby, tenía 38 años. Se casó con Dionisia Wichingham en 1351, en Ormesby St Michael, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 20 de noviembre de 1384, en Ormesby St Michael, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 44 años.
